title: LiMi Model Hierarchy
description: A hierarchical representation of the LiMi XSD schema including metadata and styling for graph visualization.

kind.description: The structural type of the node.

name.description: The human-readable, space-normalized name of the node.

description.description: Documentation extracted from the XSD 'Description=' field or general documentation tags.

tier.description: The importance or complexity level extracted from the XSD 'Tier=' field.

color.description: The hex color code assigned for consistent branch visualization.

children.description: A recursive list of child nodes (attributes and sub-elements).
